config.co_agents.enabled_desc: Tillad agenten at starte parallelle sub-agenter til komplekse opgaver.
config.co_agents.disabled_desc: Aktivér for at lade agenten delegere opgaver til parallelle sub-agenter og specialist-co-agenter.
config.co_agents.max_concurrent_desc: Maksimalt antal co-agenter, der kører samtidig.
config.co_agents.llm_desc: Vælg en udbyder til co-agenter. Falder tilbage til hoved-LLM hvis ikke angivet.
config.co_agents.specialists_desc: Specialist co-agents have role-specific prompts, tool restrictions, and optional dedicated LLM providers. Each specialist can be enabled independently.
config.co_agents.spec_researcher_desc: Websøgning, krydsreferering og faktaindsamling. Ingen shell- eller kodeudførelse.
config.co_agents.spec_coder_desc: Shell, Python, filesystem, and Git operations. No image generation.
config.co_agents.spec_designer_desc: Billedgenerering og kreative aktiver. Ingen shell- eller kodeudførelse.
config.co_agents.spec_security_desc: Security audits, OWASP/CIS/NIST checks. Read-only filesystem access.
config.co_agents.spec_writer_desc: Documentation, content, reports. Memory and filesystem access, no code execution.
